Welcome to the DIA App

Build your own oracle

DIA Oracle Builder
Autonomous, no-code oracle deployment
The DIA Oracle Deployer is a self service tool to enable anyone to define, deploy and manage their oracles.
Connect WalletMigrate

Explore DIA’s data library

DIA xMarket
Token price feeds
Market price feeds of tokens, sourced from multiple high-volume CEXs and DEXs. Customizable for every use case.
STAKE $DIA
Learn about token price feeds
DIA xFloor
NFT price feeds
Floor price information of 18,000+ NFT collections, directly sourced from NFT marketplaces on-chain trading data.
Claim NFTs
Learn about NFT floor price feeds
DIA xLSD
LST price feeds
Fair-value price feeds for Liquid Staked Tokens (LSTs), built with on-chain collateral ratio checks.
Claim Airdrop
Learn about xLSD feeds
DIA Data Sources
DeFi and NFT markets
Explore all CEXs, DEXs and NFT marketplaces which DIA leverages for data sourcing.
Explore sources
Learn about data sourcing
DIA xRandom
Random numbers
Verifiable, unpredictable and unbiased random numbers enabling various GameFi and DeFi use-cases.
latest numbers
Learn about randomness
